polite-sip.name: Polite Sip
polite-sip.line: {user} borrows a little HP from {target}. It says thank you.

thick-skin.name: Thick Skin
thick-skin.line: {user} thinks hard about leather. Defense went up.

double-straw.name: Double Straw
double-straw.line: {user} brings two straws. {target} loses HP twice as politely.

sponge-stance.name: Sponge Stance
sponge-stance.line: {user} goes full sponge. Incoming hits mean less now.

big-gulp.name: Big Gulp
big-gulp.line: {user} takes one enormous gulp of {target}'s HP. Refreshing.

buffet-rules.name: Buffet Rules
buffet-rules.line: {user} declares buffet rules. Everyone's HP is self serve now.

small-mend.name: Small Mend
small-mend.line: {user} patches {target} with kindness and a little tape.

kind-word.name: Kind Word
kind-word.line: {user} says just the right thing. {target}'s offense went up.

halo-polish.name: Halo Polish
halo-polish.line: {user} polishes a halo over {target}. HP came back shiny.

feather-guard.name: Feather Guard
feather-guard.line: {user} tucks {target} behind one big soft wing.

group-hug.name: Group Hug
group-hug.line: {user} calls a group hug. Nobody escapes. Everyone heals.

sunday-light.name: Sunday Light
sunday-light.line: {user} lets in the good light. The whole team feels like Sunday morning.

rude-jab.name: Rude Jab
rude-jab.line: {user} jabs {target} without even saying excuse me.

hot-temper.name: Hot Temper
hot-temper.line: {user} counts to three instead of ten. Offense went up.

brimstone-burp.name: Brimstone Burp
brimstone-burp.line: {user} burps brimstone at everyone. Nobody says gesundheit.

wicked-swing.name: Wicked Swing
wicked-swing.line: {user} winds up way too far and lets {target} have it.

tantrum-royale.name: Tantrum Royale
tantrum-royale.line: {user} throws a tantrum with production values. It hurts everyone.

mind-pebble.name: Mind Pebble
mind-pebble.line: {user} flicks a small thought at {target}. It lands hard.

third-eyebrow.name: Third Eyebrow
third-eyebrow.line: {user} raises a third eyebrow. {target}'s offense went down.

rune-zap.name: Rune Zap
rune-zap.line: {user} draws a rune from memory. {target} gets zapped.

double-dare.name: Double Dare
double-dare.line: {user} double dares {target}. {target} is very confused now.

comet-memo.name: Comet Memo
comet-memo.line: {user} files a memo shaped like a comet. {target} receives it.

grand-theorem.name: Grand Theorem
grand-theorem.line: {user} proves the Grand Theorem. Everyone else is the proof.

shoe-swap.name: Shoe Swap
shoe-swap.line: {user} swaps into the faster shoes. Speed went up.

itching-joke.name: Itching Joke
itching-joke.line: {user} tells a joke that itches. {target} got poisoned.

pocket-sand.name: Pocket Sand
pocket-sand.line: {user} produces pocket sand. {target}'s offense went down.

gum-snap.name: Gum Snap
gum-snap.line: {user} snaps a huge gum bubble in {target}'s face.

prank-storm.name: Prank Storm
prank-storm.line: {user} unleashes every prank at once. It's chaos out there.

steady-swing.name: Steady Swing
steady-swing.line: {user} takes a nice level swing at {target}. Coach would be proud.

line-drive.name: Line Drive
line-drive.line: {user} sends a line drive straight through {target}.

team-chant.name: Team Chant
team-chant.line: {user} starts the team chant. Everyone's offense went up.

grand-inning.name: Grand Inning
grand-inning.line: {user} plays a whole inning at {target}. The field itself pitches in.

practice-haunt.name: Practice Haunt
practice-haunt.line: {user} tries out a starter haunt on {target}. It works.

epoch-nap.name: Epoch Nap
epoch-nap.line: {user} recommends a nap lasting one epoch. {target} fell asleep.

ecto-flare.name: Ecto Flare
ecto-flare.line: {user} flares up all pale and loud. {target} takes it badly.

seance-scream.name: Seance Scream
seance-scream.line: {user} holds a seance and screams the minutes. Everyone hears it.

last-word.name: Last Word
last-word.line: {user} says the last word. {target} has no comeback.

shamble-slam.name: Shamble Slam
shamble-slam.line: {user} shambles a long way to slam {target}. Worth the trip.

moan-chorus.name: Moan Chorus
moan-chorus.line: {user} leads a moan in three parts. Everyone's defense went down.

compost-crush.name: Compost Crush
compost-crush.line: {user} drops the whole compost pile on {target}.

quick-nip.name: Quick Nip
quick-nip.line: {user} nips {target} and is back before anyone notices.

midnight-tab.name: Midnight Tab
midnight-tab.line: {user} opens a tab on {target}'s HP. It's past midnight.

bat-rsvp.name: Bat RSVP
bat-rsvp.line: {user} sends invitations. The bats all RSVP yes, at everyone.

red-banquet.name: Red Banquet
red-banquet.line: {user} hosts a banquet. {target} is the menu and the guest.

old-stare.name: Old Stare
old-stare.line: {user} stares like a portrait. {target}'s offense went down.

museum-fist.name: Museum Fist
museum-fist.line: {user} swings a fist old enough for a museum at {target}.

pillar-drop.name: Pillar Drop
pillar-drop.line: {user} drops a pillar nobody remembered ordering on {target}.

dust-of-ages.name: Dust of Ages
dust-of-ages.line: {user} shakes off the dust of ages. Everyone breathes history.

big-bang-rerun.name: Big Bang Rerun
big-bang-rerun.line: {user} reruns the big bang at {target}. Small venue this time.

encore-encore.name: Encore Encore
encore-encore.line: {user} demands an encore of the encore. Team offense went up.

spotlight-steal.name: Spotlight Steal
spotlight-steal.line: {user} steals the spotlight and {target}'s HP along with it.

confetti-nova.name: Confetti Nova
confetti-nova.line: {user} pops a nova of confetti. Everyone is dazzled and hurt.

fourth-wall-lean.name: Curtain Lean
fourth-wall-lean.line: {user} leans on the scenery. Everyone forgot whose turn it is.

backstage-pass.name: Backstage Pass
backstage-pass.line: {user} flashes backstage passes. The whole team feels famous.

secret-finale.name: Secret Finale
secret-finale.line: {user} performs the secret finale. {target} was the finale.

mud-manners.name: Mud Manners
mud-manners.line: {user} demonstrates mud manners on {target}. Rude and heavy.

pan-lid-bash.name: Pan Lid Bash
pan-lid-bash.line: {user} bashes {target} with a pan lid. The ring lasts a while.

spare-spell.name: Spare Spell
spare-spell.line: {user} finds a spare spell in a pocket. {target} catches it.

prism-wink.name: Prism Wink
prism-wink.line: {user} winks through a prism. {target} gets the full spectrum.

slime-handshake.name: Slime Handshake
slime-handshake.line: {user} offers {target} a firm, extremely damp handshake.

soot-sneeze.name: Soot Sneeze
soot-sneeze.line: {user} sneezes soot all over {target}. Gross, and also hot.

rubber-rebound.name: Rubber Rebound
rubber-rebound.line: {user} flings back everything {target} threw, plus interest.

grave-hush.name: Grave Hush
grave-hush.line: {user} lets the quiet of an old cellar settle on {target}.
